# KaTeX vendored dependency

- Version: 0.17.0
- Package: `katex@0.17.0`
- Registry: `https://registry.npmjs.org/katex/-/katex-0.17.0.tgz`
- npm integrity: `sha512-Vdw0ATsQ9V+LuegM/BTwQqV/6cTl5lbGcIrU+BCgLxyf6bo38ybOr372tuSIxir3CN720flu1meYR6XzNMwQnw==`
- License: MIT (`LICENSE` in this directory)

The repository includes only the minified browser runtime, auto-render extension,
stylesheet, and fonts required by that stylesheet. Update these files together from
one verified package archive so the JavaScript, CSS, and font metrics stay aligned.
